title: Seecret Sunday
description: A recreation of Alpha v1.1.2_01 in modern Minecraft!
body:
**Project inspired by [Not So Seecret Saturday](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/2916817-the-not-so-seecret-saturday-mod-for-alpha-1-1-2_01)!**

Early development was a iconic era for Minecraft, however, being in such a blank state, it gets in the way of what you can do in those versions. So, by changing world generation, recipes, textures and a bunch more, this modpack aims to bring a recreation of Alpha v1.1.2_01 into modern Minecraft.

Be aware that this is not completely accurate to Alpha v1.1.2_01, as I have taken some liberties with the project.

<iframe width="800" height="600" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/p-SK05VrjL4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Seecret Sunday Features
- Modern Minecraft quality-of-life tweaks and bug fixes
- Multiplayer plug-and-play
- Revamped cave system
- New building blocks
- Addition of new redstone components **(Piston, Light Bulb)**
- Better integration of mechanics **(Saddled Pigs, Music Discs, Chain Armor...)**
- And more! **[Check a bit more in the gallery and trailer!]**
 ឵
## Alpha Features
- No hunger or sprinting
- No biomes
- No structures **(Except Dungeons)**
- Disabled Nether and End dimensions
- Flames are extremely dangerous
- Minecart boosting, boat elevators
- And more! **[Download now to check more!]**

## Warnings
- If you find any inconsistency, error, bug or have some suggestion, let me know! [Issue Tracker for the Modpack](https://github.com/hazelsinferno/Seecret-Sunday-IssueTracker)
- Want to share a thought, buildings or any shenanigans made with the modpack? Join the [Discord server!](https://discord.gg/Km5GdXNBzE)
